name: @wyreup/cli-skill
description: CLI-only skill teaching Claude and other agents how to invoke the Wyreup CLI — smaller token footprint than @wyreup/skill (no MCP).
deprecated: Use `npx @wyreup/cli install-skill` instead. The npm install didn't actually install the skill anywhere useful; the CLI command copies skill.md to your agent's skills directory in one step.
author: Wyreup Contributors
